description: Model a 3D cylindrical shaft collar with an outer diameter of 30mm, an inner diameter of 15mm, and a height of 12mm. Include an 8mm diameter radial through-hole on exactly one side of the wall, centered vertically (6mm from the base). Save the parametric file to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/radial_collar.slvs and export the triangle mesh to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/radial_collar.stl.
